sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109547" key="u(poxai/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποχαίρω</orth>, <sense id="n109547.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rejoice secretly,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εἰς τὸ κακόν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
